context: Evaluates whether the agent writes a policy with properly structured OPA tests, including correct test package naming, input mocking, deny message verification, and both positive and negative test cases.

checklist.name: test file uses _test package suffix
checklist.description: The test file declares a package with the `_test` suffix (e.g. `package kubernetes.admission_test`) and imports the policy under test

checklist.name: tests mock input with `with input as`
checklist.description: Test rules use `with input as { ... }` to supply mock AdmissionReview input rather than relying on real input

checklist.name: tests verify deny message content
checklist.description: At least one test checks that a specific message is present in the deny set (e.g. `"some message" in policy.deny with input as ...`), not just that `count(deny) > 0`

checklist.name: includes both positive and negative tests
checklist.description: Tests cover both the compliant case (deny is empty) and the violating case (deny contains a message)

checklist.name: tests pass
checklist.description: All tests pass when running `opa test . -v`
